title: Frontend Batch 31 - Public Inline Blog Delete Failure Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public inline Blog delete failures so technical backend details are sanitized and failed deletes do not navigate, refresh, or remove retry affordances.
behaviorBugsFound: Public inline Blog delete failures could show raw SQL, status, stack, and backend details in the toast message.

validation.command: npx skills find public inline blog delete failure react testing
validation.notes: Results were low-install/general React testing skills; no new skill was installed.
RED run failed with 1 raw technical delete failure assertion.

remainingGaps: PublicBlogDetailAdminActions has a separate dynamic/client-gate fetch boundary and should receive dedicated coverage for loaded-detail delete failure sanitization.
Public inline Blog editor load failure text is safe, but detailed retry/browser session behavior can be revisited with e2e once Docker/backend availability is restored.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 32 - Public Detail Admin Action Failure Reinforcement.
